steps.title: Ignore the parenthetical
steps.content: The phrase "such as the domestic goat (Capra aegagrus hircus)" is only an example set off by commas. Remove that interruption, and the core sentence is "even-toed ungulates ______ to a vast and diverse order of animals." The subject "ungulates" is plural.

steps.title: Choose the plural verb
steps.content: Choice A, "belongs," is singular. Choice B uses the singular auxiliary "has," and Choice C uses the singular auxiliary "is." A plural subject needs the plural present-tense verb "belong" to state the general classification: even-toed ungulates belong to a vast order of animals. The answer is D.
